docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SLAYTON, RUSSELL AS TO DEFENDANT AT&T CORP. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-15-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

MAILING OF COURT ORDERED CONTINUANCE TO PLAINTIFF RETURNED: ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY DEFENDANT AT&T CORP.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-15-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-12-2016 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCE BY EITHER PLAINTIFF RUSSELL SLAYTON OR AT&T CORP. SETTLEMENT PENDING. IF NEITHER PARTY APPEARS AT THE NEXT CALLING OF THE CASE THE COURT SHALL DISMISS THE MATTER WITH PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO THE COURT'S ORDER ISSUED AT THE LAST CALLING OF THE CASE ON 7/15/16.
